issues.title: Damage spike: enemy dealt 9 dmg (64% of 14 HP) on floor 1
issues.description: At turn seq 124 (floor 1, encounter 1, turn 12), the enemy dealt 9 damage when the player had 14 HP. This is 64% of the player's current HP, exceeding the 50% spike threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 9 damage (64% of player's 14 HP)

issues.title: Damage spike: enemy dealt 9 dmg (180% of 5 HP) on floor 1
issues.description: At turn seq 128 (floor 1, encounter 1, turn 13), the enemy dealt 9 damage when the player had 5 HP. This is 180% of the player's current HP, exceeding the 50% spike threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 9 damage (180% of player's 5 HP)

issues.title: Damage spike: enemy dealt 9 dmg (300% of 3 HP) on floor 1
issues.description: At turn seq 132 (floor 1, encounter 1, turn 14), the enemy dealt 9 damage when the player had 3 HP. This is 300% of the player's current HP, exceeding the 50% spike threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 9 damage (300% of player's 3 HP)

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 1, encounter 1 (crystal_golem) — struggling profile
issues.description: The struggling player was defeated by crystal_golem (common) on floor 1, encounter 1 after 14 turns. They dealt 35 damage but took 108. Accuracy was 39.0%. Dying on floor 1 is extremely punishing for retention.

evidence.metric: Defeated on floor 1 by crystal_golem (108 damage taken)

issues.suggestedFix: Reduce floor 1 enemy damage or HP, or add canary difficulty reduction for struggling players

issues.title: Unfun moment: HP dropped from 64 to 0 in single encounter (floor 1, crystal_golem)
issues.description: During encounter 1 on floor 1 against crystal_golem (common), the player's HP plummeted from 64 (80%) to 0 (0%). This 64 HP loss in a single encounter feels punishing and demoralizing, especially for struggling players.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap maximum damage per encounter or add a "mercy" mechanic that reduces damage after a severe hit
